overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay showing a convertible driving at high speed through an elevated futuristic highway system. The vehicle passes the iconic Arasaka tower, holographic billboards, and transitions from open sky to covered tunnel sections with complex multi-level interchanges.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated corporate highway with Arasaka tower

events.description: overtakes a red sedan in the left lane

agents.ego_description: driving a cream-colored convertible at high speed down the center lane of the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving in left lane, overtaken by ego vehicle

entered.detail: massive black corporate skyscraper with vertical white ARASAKA signage
metal safety barrier with yellow and black warning stripes
metal safety barrier along the right edge of the road
large digital advertisement screen displaying animated purple and pink graphics
metal highway sign structure spanning across the road lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway in a futuristic city, dominated by the massive Arasaka tower on the right. The convertible drives at high speed past holographic billboards and metal railings, overtaking a red sedan in the left lane under bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway transition with toll gantries and distant mountains

events.description: passes under large toll gantry with directional signage and traffic lights
futuristic flying vehicle appears hovering above the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while navigating through moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: flying car with blue accents hovering above the road moving in the same direction

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure with traffic signs and warning lights
futuristic hovering vehicle with glowing blue thrusters
distant brown mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a large toll gantry structure as the Arasaka tower recedes behind. A flying car appears overhead, hovering above the highway. The landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains on the right while digital billboards line the left side of the road.

agents.ego_description: driving on the orange-tinted road surface approaching the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: dark tunnel opening with blue neon lighting trim around the entrance
complex metal scaffolding and pipe structures alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The road surface transitions to an orange rust color as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance. Industrial scaffolding lines the left side while the mountains become more prominent on the right. The flying vehicle disappears into the distance as the tunnel entrance looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway with glass canopy and multi-level interchanges

events.description: enters dark tunnel underpass causing sudden drop in ambient light
exits tunnel into covered highway section with complex overhead architecture

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered highway section with multiple levels of road infrastructure visible overhead

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving parallel in the left lane

entered.detail: transparent and opaque glass panels forming a roof over the highway with holographic projections
curved multi-level highway ramp with concrete supports
elevated highway structure with glass sections allowing light through

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a brief dark tunnel before emerging into a spectacular covered highway section with complex multi-level interchanges. Glass and concrete overpasses crisscross overhead with holographic advertisements projected on the canopy. The lighting becomes mixed as sunlight filters through the glass panels while the vehicle shares the road with a yellow sports car.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive along an elevated futuristic highway that transitions from an open city skyline into a complex, covered architectural interchange. It begins by racing past the massive Arasaka tower and holographic billboards under bright morning sunlight, overtaking a red sedan. As the vehicle passes under a toll gantry, the tower recedes and the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains and a hovering flying car overhead. The scene then shifts as the road surface turns a rusty orange and the camera passes industrial scaffolding, moving steadily toward a looming tunnel entrance. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the darkness into a spectacular covered section where sunlight filters through glass panels and concrete overpasses crisscross above a road shared with a yellow sports car.
